hero.subtitle: Your 24/7 autonomous agency. We don't sell software — we return your time. Recover lost leads and run your business while you sleep.

howItWorks.label: Implementation
howItWorks.title: How We Give Your Time Back.
howItWorks.subtitle: We don't give you software to figure out. We set up a fully automated system tailored to your business in under 48 hours.

01.title: Audit The Revenue Leaks
01.desc: Every missed call and forgotten follow-up costs you money. We connect to your existing tools — calculating exactly where you're losing hours and revenue — and deploy a system to recover it instantly.

02.title: Tell Us What You Need
02.desc: No complex setup screens or visual editors. Just tell our AI what your business does, what's not working, and what you want automated. It interviews you, understands your needs, and builds the solution.

03.title: Test Everything First
03.desc: We don't go live until you're confident. Your automations run through a sandbox simulation against real scenarios. Review the results, adjust if needed, and deploy with one click.

04.title: Your Business Runs Itself
04.desc: Once live, your automations handle calls, qualify leads, follow up with prospects, and resolve common requests — all while sending you a clear daily summary of everything that happened.

callCenter.title: Call Center Agent
callCenter.subtitle: Deploys human-like Voice AI to handle thousands of inbound and outbound calls simultaneously with sub-second response times. Checks your inventory, books appointments in your calendar, and updates your CRM — all during a live phone conversation.

sdr.title: SDR Agent
sdr.subtitle: Autonomously prospects, qualifies, and books meetings around the clock. Mines intent signals across email and CRM data to find your best leads and converts them at rates far above the industry average.

marketing.title: Marketing Agent
marketing.subtitle: Orchestrates multi-channel content distribution with AI-optimized copy. Scales your pipeline growth by automating campaigns across email, social, and ads — with a single approval click before any major spend.

cfo.title: CFO Agent
cfo.subtitle: Delivers real-time financial intelligence across invoicing, cash flow forecasting, and expense tracking. Monitors your runway, alerts you to anomalies, and auto-generates clean reports for your accountant.

agentGenerator.title: Need something bespoke? Just ask in chat.
agentGenerator.subtitle: Forget complex visual editors. TirionApp AI builds and deploys autonomous agents based solely on your description. Conversational. Instant. Scalable.

pricing.title: Architect your scale.
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready. Every plan includes credits for AI workflow executions — buy more only if you need them.

creditExplainer.title: What is a credit?
creditExplainer.description: 1 credit = 1 AI workflow execution. Every time your automation processes an email, qualifies a lead, answers a phone call, or runs any task — it uses 1 credit. Your plan includes credits each month. If you run out, buy more at a discount.
